title: Better TPA
description: This plugin will add tp asking to people along with a way to toggle tpa requests
body:
This plugin will add tp asking to people along with a way to toggle tpa requests, this also adds tpauto, which automatically accepts all tpa requests.
Commands: 
/tpa
/tpahere
/tphere
/tp
/tptoggle
/tpaccept
/tpacancel
/tpauto
/tpdeny
/tpask
/tpall
